name: bitcoin-gift-wallet
description: Generate, manage, and spend Bitcoin paper wallets. Create printable bill images with QR codes (SegWit and Taproot), check balances, sweep funds, and recover using backup keys. All keys and signing happen locally — nothing leaves your machine.

tools.name: generate_segwit_wallet
tools.description: Generate a Bitcoin SegWit (P2WPKH, bc1q...) paper wallet bill image

tools.name: generate_taproot_wallet
tools.description: Generate a Bitcoin Taproot (P2TR, bc1p...) paper wallet bill image, with optional backup key

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Check the Bitcoin balance of an address via mempool.space

tools.name: check_all_balances
tools.description: Check balances of all previously generated wallets

tools.name: sweep_wallet
tools.description: Sweep all funds from a paper wallet to a destination address

tools.name: recover_wallet
tools.description: Recover funds from a Taproot paper wallet using the backup key

tools.name: open_wallet_app
tools.description: Open the Bitcoin Gift Wallet web app in the browser

tools.name: list_generated_wallets
tools.description: List previously generated wallet bill images

tools.name: open_wallet_bill
tools.description: Open a previously generated wallet bill image
